action.base_canvas: near-black with imperceptible cool undertone (#08-#10 range)
action.surface_strategy: luminance stepping (canvas -> panel -> elevated, +0.04 lightness per step)

action.usage_constraint: only on primary CTA, brand mark, key interactive accents

dropped.reason: conflicts_with binance-components-50px-pill-cta-token-004 (extreme pill (50) vs zero radius — opposite chrome philosophies)
conflicts_with figma-color-binary-chrome-001 (chromatic-free chrome vs persistent purple chromatic ladder — opposite chrome strategies)
conflicts_with linear-app-color-single-chromatic-anchor-002 (1 vs 2 chromatic anchors — different chromatic budget philosophies)
conflicts_with linear-app-color-dark-native-001 (warm-light canvas vs cool-dark canvas — opposite ambient strategies)
conflicts_with linear-app-color-dark-native-001 (dark-native canvas vs pure-white canvas — opposite base assumptions)
conflicts_with linear-app-color-dark-native-001 (text rules apply to opposite background contexts)
conflicts_with linear-app-color-translucent-borders-003 (translucent-white-border vs shadow-as-border — different border philosophies for different canvases)
conflicts_with vercel-components-dark-pill-cta-007 (transparent ghost button vs solid dark CTA — opposite primary-button strategies)
